Brand Guide
Colors Typography Logo Spacing Components
v1.0  ·  March 2026
Hindsight

Brand Guide

Visual specifications for designers and developers. One source of truth. No exceptions.

v1.0March 2026
Primary fontSora
Palette5 colors
01

Colors

Core palette
Navy
#0D1B3E
Primary background. Wordmark. Body text on light.
Blue
#1A6FD4
CTAs. Links. Primary interactive states.
Sky
#5BB8F5
Logo mark. Accent on dark backgrounds. Data highlights.
Amber
#D97706
Alerts. Callouts. Stat badges. Never dominant.
White
#FFFFFF
Card backgrounds. Primary surface. Text on dark.
Neutral scale
Gray 50
#F6F8FC
Gray 100
#EAEEF5
Gray 200
#D3DAE8
Gray 400
#8A97AE
Gray 600
#4A5A72
Gray 700
#2E3F58
All grays are derived from Navy. They carry a cool blue undertone. Do not substitute warm or neutral-gray values — they clash with the logo.
Color roles
Color Primary uses Never use for
Navy Page backgrounds · Hero sections · Primary headings · Nav · Wordmark Body text on white (too heavy — use Gray 700)
Blue CTA buttons · Hyperlinks · Focus rings · Active nav states Large background fills · Error states
Sky Logo mark · Accents on dark · Data callout highlights Text on white backgrounds (contrast too low) · CTAs
Amber Alert badges · Warning states · Stat callouts that need attention Primary buttons · Backgrounds · Any decorative use
02

Typography

Primary typeface
Sora
ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ
abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz
0123456789 & . , : ; ? ! — " '
Source
Google Fonts
Weights used
300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800
Import
fonts.googleapis.com
Fallback
system-ui, sans-serif
Code & technical
DM Mono
#0D1B3E   44px / 1.1   font-weight: 800
<section id="hero"> · rgba(26,111,212,0.08)
Use for
Hex values, px specs, code, labels
Weights used
400, 500
Never use for
Body copy, headlines, buttons
Source
Google Fonts
Type scale
Display / Hero
52px · 800 · −0.03em
Win less. Know why.
Heading 1
36px · 700 · −0.02em
Your CRM is wrong.
Heading 2
26px · 700 · −0.015em
100% deal coverage. Automatically.
Heading 3
20px · 600 · −0.01em
AI interviews fill the gaps.
Body large
17px · 400 · 0em
Buyers go cold fast. Hindsight sends personalized AI interviews to reps via Slack and buyers via email within 48 hours of close. The questions are specific to that deal.
Body default
15px · 400 · 0em
Every closed deal analyzed within 48 hours. CRM data cross-referenced against call transcripts and email threads. Conflicts flagged and resolved.
UI Label
12px · 600 · +0.06em
Win-Loss Analysis  ·  350K+ Deals  ·  Live
Caption
12px · 400 · 0em
Last synced 3 hours ago  ·  128,000+ corrections in 2025  ·  Requires Salesforce integration
03

Logo

Approved variations
On Navy Preferred
On White Preferred
On Pale Blue Use sparingly
Inverted on Blue Use sparingly
✕
On colored background Never
✕
On busy background Never
Clear space

Maintain minimum clear space equal to the height of the "H" in Hindsight on all sides. Never crowd the logo.

min. 1× cap-height min.
Minimum sizes
Digital
Full lockup (logo + wordmark): 120px wide minimum
Mark only: 24px wide minimum
Favicon: 16px × 16px (mark only, simplified)
Print
Full lockup: 30mm wide minimum
Mark only: 8mm wide minimum
Always use vector source files for print.
04

Spacing

Base unit is 4px. All spacing values are multiples of 4. Use the tokens below in code. Do not use arbitrary values.

space-1
4px
Icon padding. Tight inline gaps.
space-2
8px
Badge padding. Gap between label and value.
space-3
12px
Button vertical padding. Form field padding.
space-4
16px
Card padding (small). Gap between list items.
space-6
24px
Card padding (default). Section sub-element gaps.
space-8
32px
Between cards in a grid. Section header margin.
space-12
48px
Vertical section padding (mobile). Major element separation.
space-18
72px
Horizontal page padding (desktop). Section top/bottom padding.
Border radius
4px
Tags, table cells
8px
Buttons, inputs
12px
Cards, panels
20px
Modals, icon marks
9999px
Pills, badges
05

Components

Buttons
See results →
Badges
Live Needs attention Win-Loss Deal Review Agent +44%
Inputs
Work email
We'll send your first analysis here.
CRM instance
Enter a valid Salesforce URL.
Stat callout
+12%
LaunchDarkly
Competitive win rate
−86d
Ironclad
Time to insight
128K+
Loss reasons corrected
in 2025
Quote block

"Gong tells me how often things come up. Hindsight tells me how the win rate changes when we talk about that topic."

Toby Laforest  ·  Sr. Director of Market Insights, Ironclad
Dividers
Default (1px, Gray 100)
Section (1px, Gray 200)
